result:
Confirmed via grep across the whole repo (excluding `deps/`) — same result whether scoped to `src/` or the full tree, and none exist outside `src/`.

**Answer: 66 .c files** directly `#include "server.h"`, all under `src/`:

```
acl.c            crc16.c        hyperloglog.c    networking.c        server.c
aof.c            db.c           iothread.c       notify.c            slowlog.c
bio.c            debug.c        keymeta.c        object.c            socket.c
bitops.c         defrag.c       latency.c        pubsub.c            sort.c
blocked.c        entry.c        lazyfree.c       rdb.c               sparkline.c
call_reply.c     estore.c       logreqres.c      redis-check-aof.c   sparsearray.c
childinfo.c      eval.c         lolwut.c         redis-check-rdb.c   syncio.c
cluster_asm.c    evict.c        lolwut5.c        replication.c       t_array.c
cluster_legacy.c expire.c       lolwut6.c        resp_parser.c       t_hash.c
cluster.c        fwtree.c       lolwut8.c        rio.c               t_list.c
commands.c       gcra.c         memory_prefetch.c script_lua.c       t_set.c
config.c         hotkeys.c      module.c         script.c            t_stream.c
connection.c                    multi.c          sentinel.c          t_string.c
                                                                      t_zset.c
                                                                      threads_mngr.c
                                                                      timeout.c
                                                                      tls.c
                                                                      tracking.c
                                                                      unix.c
```

(Method note: this is a textual `#include` search, since LSP's find-references/call-hierarchy operate on symbols rather than preprocessor includes — grep is the correct tool for this particular question.)
